data.title: Suspected Private Key Leak Leads to $1.1 Million Loss Across EVM Chains
data.description: According to PANews, blockchain investigator ZachXBT revealed that approximately 23 hours ago, a victim experienced unusual transactions across five EVM chain wallets, resulting in a total loss of around $1.1 million. The incident is suspected to be due to a private key leak. The attacker swiftly converted all assets to ETH and transferred 330 ETH into Tornado Cash for mixing.

data.title: Spanish Police Uncover Violent Kidnapping Targeting Cryptocurrency Holders
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Spanish authorities have recently dismantled a violent kidnapping operation targeting cryptocurrency holders. A man and his partner were abducted, with the man being shot in the leg during an escape attempt. He was later found dead in a forest near Mijas, Malaga province. Police have arrested five individuals in Spain, while four others have been charged in Denmark, highlighting the international scope of such criminal networks.

As the value of cryptocurrencies rises, similar violent incidents have surged globally. In 2024, multiple kidnappings targeting cryptocurrency holders occurred in Canada, France, the United States, and Paris. Criminals typically detain victims for several hours, coercing them into revealing wallet passwords or biometric access.

Experts emphasize that these recurring crimes indicate that perpetrators are developing specialized knowledge in targeting crypto assets, posing a significant threat to digital currency holders.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Proposes Major Reforms for Financial Stability Oversight
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. Treasury Secretary Besant has proposed significant reforms to the Financial Stability Oversight Council. The proposal aims to promote more relaxed regulations and a freer approach to financial oversight.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 90,000 USDT with a 2.22% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Dec 11, 2025, 13:19 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 90,000 USDT and is now trading at 89,990.023438 USDT, with a narrowed 2.22% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: TaoWeave: TAO holdings have increased to 24,382, and the stock code has been updated to TWAV.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Bittensor (TAO) treasury company TaoWeave (formerly Oblong) announced it has changed its ticker symbol to "TWAV". The company also disclosed that it has increased its holdings by 2,439 TAO tokens in the past month, bringing its total holdings to 24,382 tokens, with a current mNAV of 1.19. (Businesswire)

data.title: Sanctum launches the Sanctum App and opens a waiting list.
data.description: Sanctum, Solana's liquidity staking protocol, announced the launch of the Sanctum App on the X platform, and a waiting list is now open. Mobile users can earn up to 10% SOL rewards (daily payouts), collect Cloud Pets, and more within the app.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessant proposed major reforms to the Financial Stability Oversight Council.
data.description: According to market sources, U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessant has proposed major reforms to the Financial Stability Oversight Council. (Jinshi)

data.title: Grayscale Bittensor Trust will trade on the OTCQX market under the ticker symbol GTAO.
data.description: Grayscale's Bittensor Trust will trade on the OTCQX market under the ticker symbol GTAO, entering the public market as a new investment vehicle for the TAO token. GTAO is reportedly the first publicly traded investment product in the US designed to offer TAO investment opportunities, and just days later, the token's native Bittensor network will undergo its first halving event. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Revolut Partners With Trust Wallet to Enable Instant Crypto Purchases Across the EEA
data.description:
Revolut and Trust Wallet have launched a new integration that allows users across the European Economic Area to purchase cryptocurrencies instantly and send them directly to self-custody.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/revolut-partners-with-trust-wallet-to-enable-instant-crypto-purchases-across-the-eea/

data.title: Analyst: "1011 Insider Whale" opened ETH long positions and unstaking them 8 days beforehand, suggesting prior knowledge of the situation.
data.description: Eye, the on-chain analyst who previously exposed the "1011 Insider Whale," posted on the X platform that the "1011 Insider Whale's" recent series of operations have revealed its long ETH positions. Specifically, over $220 million was borrowed through Aave and deposited into Binance, likely to support its long positions. The funds originated from three addresses starting with 0xF6FD, 0x4116, and 0xF744. Furthermore, its current $273 million long ETH position on Hyperliquid originates from an address starting with 0xb317. Eye's further investigation revealed that the "1011 Insider Whale" unstaking its ETH in its staking pool eight days before opening its long ETH positions (when the market was still sluggish), as if it had prior knowledge of something.

data.title: Canaan Creative acquired 100 BTC from the open market in November, bringing its total Bitcoin holdings to 1,730.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company Canaan Creative released its unaudited operating report for November, disclosing that it mined 89 BTC in November and strategically acquired 100 BTC from the open market by taking advantage of price fluctuations. At the end of the month, the company's cryptocurrency inventory on its balance sheet reached 1,730 BTC and 3,951 ETH. Furthermore, Canaan Creative disclosed that as of December 10, 2025, it had cumulatively repurchased approximately 6.59 million American Depositary Shares (ADSs), for a total consideration of approximately US$4.9 million. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Bitcoin stalled at $95k after a hidden Fed warning quietly derailed the post-cut celebration
data.description:
Bitcoin pushed toward $95,000 in the hours before the Federal Reserve’s Dec. 18 meeting, then retreated to the $92,000 zone amid Jerome Powell’s confirmation of a mixed-to-bearish stance for 2026 and delicate on-chain structure. The Fed delivered an expected quarter-point cut, bringing the target range to 4. 25%-4
source: https://cryptoslate.com/bitcoin-stalled-at-95k-after-a-hidden-fed-warning-quietly-derailed-the-post-cut-celebration/

data.title: A16z Crypto Report Highlights Growth in Stablecoin Transactions and Future Trends
data.description: According to Odaily, a16z Crypto has released its annual report, covering various sectors including stablecoins, tokenization, payments and finance, privacy, security, AI, and agents. The report reveals that stablecoin transaction volume reached $46 trillion in 2024, surpassing PayPal's transaction volume by 20 times and nearing Visa's transaction volume by three times. Additionally, the report discusses the tokenization of traditional assets, particularly through blockchain technology, bringing U.S. stocks, commodities, and indices onto the blockchain. Furthermore, a16z forecasts the integration of AI and crypto technologies, predicting widespread adoption of decentralized payment systems by 2026.

data.title: Nasdaq-listed Caliber disclosed that it has pledged 75,000 LINK tokens and will increase the pledge ratio.
data.description: Caliber, a Nasdaq-listed diversified real estate and digital asset management platform, disclosed that it has staked 75,000 LINK tokens from its treasury with a Chainlink node operator. The aim is to directly participate in the construction of Chainlink's core cybersecurity infrastructure and earn staking rewards. Caliber also stated that it plans to further increase the staking ratio in the future. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Binance Alpha 2.0 will support DeAgentAI (AIA) contract swaps.
data.description: Binance has announced that Alpha 2.0 will support contract swaps for DeAgentAI (AIA). Starting December 11, 2025 at 20:00 (UTC+8), Binance Alpha 2.0 temporarily suspended AIA trading to execute this contract swap. The swap will be executed at a 1:1 ratio. The snapshot time is December 11, 2025 at 20:00 (UTC+8). Binance Alpha 2.0 will resume DeAgentAI (AIA) trading on December 15, 2025 at 16:00 (UTC+8).

data.title: Those who won the Moore Thread lottery may see a floating profit of over 410,000 yuan per lot.
data.description: Today, Moore Threads' stock price surged 28.04% to close at 941.08 yuan per share, a new high since its listing, with a total market capitalization of 442.3 billion yuan. Compared to its initial public offering price of 114.28 yuan per share, Moore Threads' stock price has risen 723.49% in the past five trading days. If an investor had won a lottery for Moore Threads shares and held them until today's closing price, their unrealized profit per share would exceed 410,000 yuan. (Cailian Press)

data.title: BitMEX upgrades its mobile app, optimizing the UI and interaction mode.
data.description: Crypto derivatives exchange BitMEX today announced a major upgrade to its mobile application, introducing a redesigned interface and a brand-new interaction mode. This update provides a streamlined user experience, prioritizing instant responsiveness, simplified order processing, and improved access to key trading instruments. The upgraded BitMEX mobile application features a lighter, more focused user interface that highlights information hierarchy and reduces visual clutter. Traders can now use faster gesture-driven controls, including a "swipe to close" function, allowing users to close positions with a single gesture. The fast trading process has also been redesigned to help users reduce clicks and navigate the market more clearly. Additional feature enhancements include a simplified KYC process, one-click fiat-to-crypto purchases, and improved navigation for market and account operations via gesture controls. Users can access over 80 derivative contracts with low latency, as well as trading bots, copy trading, instant cryptocurrency purchases, and zero-fee cryptocurrency swaps.

data.title: U.S. Commerce Secretary Rutnick: Previously hoped the Federal Reserve would cut interest rates more significantly.
data.description: U.S. Commerce Secretary Rutnick stated that he had previously hoped the Federal Reserve would cut interest rates more significantly. (Jinshi)

data.title: a16z Crypto Annual Report: Decentralized Payment Systems May Be Widely Used by 2026
data.description: a16z Crypto released its annual report, covering multiple areas including stablecoins, tokenization, payments and finance, privacy, security, AI, and agents. a16z disclosed data showing that stablecoin trading volume reached $46 trillion in 2024, more than 20 times that of PayPal and nearly three times that of Visa. The report also mentioned the advancement of traditional asset tokenization, especially the integration of assets such as US stocks, commodities, and indices onto the blockchain through crypto technology. Furthermore, a16z projected the convergence of AI and crypto technology, predicting widespread adoption of decentralized payment systems by 2026.

data.title: Do Kwon will face court sentencing today and could face up to 12 years in prison.
data.description: Terraform Labs founder Do Kwon will be sentenced later today (December 11) in a Manhattan court by U.S. District Judge Paul Engelmayer. Prosecutors have reportedly requested a 12-year prison sentence for Kwon, citing factors including his guilty plea. At a hearing presided over by U.S. District Judge Paul Engelmayer for the Southern District of New York, Kwon pleaded guilty to two charges of conspiracy to commit fraud and wire fraud. In January, he pleaded not guilty to nine counts, including securities fraud, wire fraud, merchandise fraud, and money laundering. (Decrypt)
